channel.title: Greg Rickaby
channel.description: Alabama-based software engineer, self-taught photographer, and published author.

item.title: The Moons of 2023
item.description: I tried to take a photo of the moon each month in 2023. Was I able to do it?

item.title: Brightening the Frame: How Gain Maps Elevate HDR Photography
item.description: A look at how Gain Maps work, how Adobe Lightroom's HDR workflow enables true High Dynamic Range exports, and real-world photo comparisons between SDR and HDR.

item.title: Stable Diffusion XL 1.0 Impresses
item.description: A hands-on look at Stable Diffusion XL 1.0, comparing its 1024-pixel output against SD 1.5 and testing the new refiner model in both Automatic1111 and ComfyUI.

item.title: Behind The Shot: Strawberry Supermoon
item.description: A behind-the-scenes account of preparing for the June 2022 Strawberry Supermoon.

item.title: Displaying EXIF Data in WordPress
item.description: How to display EXIF data (aperture, ISO, shutter speed, focal length) from your WordPress media library using a simple shortcode.

item.title: 2018: A Year In Review
item.description: A look back at 2018: a promotion to Director of Engineering, a first family vacation to Disney World, major home renovations, and 6,000 miles on the road.

item.title: 2016: A Year In Review
item.description: Greg reminisces about 2016, in yet another "Year In Review" blog post...because the Internet needed another one of these right?

item.title: Hello Chloe Grace
item.description: My account of the day Chloe Grace was born at Medical Center Enterprise in Enterprise, Alabama.

item.title: Genesis Code Snippets
item.description: My collection of code snippets that I use while coding the Genesis Framework for WordPress.

item.title: Microphone Shootout: Behringer B-1 vs Neumann TLM 103
item.description: Greg gives his interpretation on the differences between a Behringer B-1 and a Neumann TLM 103.

item.title: How To: Install LAMP on Ubuntu
item.description: A laundry list of commands to help you install a LAMP stack on Ubuntu+.

item.title: Web Typography: Using The Golden Ratio and REMs
item.description: How to use REM units and the Golden Ratio Typography Calculator to set font sizes, line heights, and margins with mathematical precision.
